About Company

Your Trusted Partner in Commercial & Residential Construction

Vertical Horizons Construction Group, from its incorporation in 2011, has grown and developed into a highly revered and sought-after company. Vertical Horizons is second to none in all areas, with credit due to its staffs’ dedicated commitment to excellence and innovative leadership. We strive to become an established and recognized company in all sectors of the building industry.We have created various projects that include:
  • Nursing Homes
  • Demolition
  • refurbishment
READ MORE ABOUT
About VERTICAL HORIZONS CONSTRUCTION

Your Trusted Partner in Construction

Since its founding in 2011, our company has evolved into a beacon of reliability in the construction industry, underpinned by a steadfast dedication to customer satisfaction and the professional growth of our employees. Our unparalleled success is a testament to our team’s unwavering commitment to excellence and visionary leadership. We are ambitious in our goal to become an integral part of the construction sector for both federal and local government projects.
  • SENIOR LIVING FACILITIES
  • refurbishment
  • Food production facilities
READ MORE ABOUT
SERVICES

WHAT WE OFFER

At Vertical Horizons Construction, we are committed to delivering high-quality construction solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client. With over a decade of experience, we provide comprehensive services across a wide range of sectors, from residential to large-scale commercial projects. We combine innovative building techniques with sustainable practices to ensure every project is completed efficiently, safely, and on budget.
VIEW MORE SERVICES
General Contracting

As your trusted general contractor, Vertical Horizons Construction oversees every aspect of your project,

Residential Construction

rom custom homes to multi-family residential developments, we offer full-service residential construction solutions.

Commercial Construction

Our team is experienced in building and renovating commercial properties of all sizes.

Design-Build Services

Our design-build approach streamlines the construction process by integrating design and construction services,

OUR CUSTOMERS

WHAT CLIENT SAYS

I wanted to express our appreciation for the excellent services that First Citizens received from Vertical Horizons Construction in the construction of its new facility in Clemson, SC. The project was extremely successful and our personnel could not have been more pleased with their new work environment.
John FreemanFormer Senior Vice President, First Citizens
We needed a relatively minor renovation in our office, but needed it to be done over the weekend. Not only did Vertical Horizons Construction complete the project at a reasonable cost, but on-time and exactly as agreed upon. I would definitely use them again.
David KrasnerClient
I highly recommend Vertical Horizons Construction. Their team arrived and completed the job on the exact dates promised. Edward did research to find out how to do our project the best and most cost-effective way being that we were off-site. He communicated with us throughout the process and often kept us informed with progress pictures. We will definitely use Vertical Horizons again for future projects.
Susan MilloyEntrepreneur
